name: Blue Michigan
subject: Trump just left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:

Friend: Donald Trump was just in Michigan for the second time in two months because he knows Democrats must win here to take back the Senate.

**And recently, we learned that dark-money ****GOP groups are spending more to defeat Gary than _any_ other in-cycle Democratic senator.**
Now, recent polling shows Gary statistically tied in a race that CBS reports will decide the future of the Senate. Defeating the dangerous agenda of Trump and McConnell depends on winning in Michigan, but right now, our fundraising is falling short of what we need to win.
That's why we've set a $20,000 rapid-response goal before midnight. And with only hours left before our deadline, we're still $4,291 short of our MUST-HIT goal.

**With Senate control up for grabs, Gary's counting on your immediate donation to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats. **

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: Help us hit our $100,000 fundraising goal by chipping in whatever you can afford before Wednesday. We're rejecting all corporate PAC donations, so your contribution goes a very long way towards helping us win.
body:
She only did it for political cover because she is up for reelection...

Friends -
Senator Collins will only vote against her party when it won't make a difference to the outcome.
That's why she voted in favor of witnesses AFTER McConnell already had the votes to block the measure. But she voted TWELVE times against hearing from witnesses and evaluating important evidence.
**She only did it for political cover because she is up for reelection -- NOT because she actually cares about getting all the facts in this trial.**
We're sick of it -- and we're launching an emergency fundraising drive to fight back. Chip in whatever you can afford at this link to help us hit our $100,000 goal:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/100k](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580291b/4bef7a87/6d7fca57/287fb124/3188193348/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDMtMi12Mi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200203-2-v2-full")**
Thanks for your fight, and thanks in advance for chipping in.
\- Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580291b/4bef7a87/6d7fca57/287fb124/3188193348/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDMtMi12Mi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200203-2-v2-full")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580291b/4bef7a87/6d7fca57/287fb13b/3188193348/VEsF/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580291b/4bef7a87/6d7fca57/287fb13a/3188193348/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580291b/4bef7a87/6d7fca57/287fb139/3188193348/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Who does Cory Gardner work for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello -- Republicans are rushing through a sham of a trial to end the impeachment of Donald Trump as soon as possible -- with no witnesses and no documents. When it's over, Washington will return to its tired, old, "business as usual" ways, and when it does, I want you to remember this: **My opponent, Cory Gardner, voted to block the American people from the full truth and effectively ended the trial of Donald Trump.** He showed all of us that he works for his party bosses, campaign checks, and special interests -- not the people he was elected to serve. It's a shame. Colorado is the Democrats' best chance to flip a Senate seat and get Washington working. As you know, I'm refusing donations from corporate PACs because, unlike my opponent, I never want there to be a question of who I'm working for. **Will you donate $10 or more today to help us defeat Cory Gardner and flip this Senate seat? Anything you can give will go a long way:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200203?refcode=em-200203-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

We're so grateful

Your support of this campaign has been huge!

http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDE2OTU2NzQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTcwMDI1OTA4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Peter,

We have great news! Thanks to the incredible help from grassroots supporters like you, our team has been able to successfully fend off Nancy Pelosi and her handpicked candidate’s advances, and hit our first fundraising goal of 2020!

Your support of this campaign has been huge, Peter! And we are so grateful for your continued support and dedication. Frankly, it is making all of the difference in our fight to defend the Miami Valley from Pelosi’s plot to take over Ohio’s 10th congressional district.

Mike Turner continues to fight for the people of this district in Washington. He has added over 10,000 jobs to Wright-Patterson Air Force Base. Your dedication to this campaign is helping ensure that Mike will win, and can continue fighting for Dayton and the Miami Valley every day.

We’ve been able to stay ahead of the competition thus far because of your generous support. We need to keep building up on this momentum if we are to secure victory in November. This fight is far from over.

Thank you,

Team Turner

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: what is at stake:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390373/55b66746/22093df4/80ff20a/3004625671/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | by no means is this a slow news week: Iowa caucus results tonight, the State of the Union tomorrow, and on Wednesday the Senate will vote on the impeachment of Donald Trump. **While it all may seem overwhelming, we have to remember: at the end of the day, we, the people, are the deciders of our fate. Because we have the ultimate power - our vote.** Our collective voices will begin to choose Donald Trump's Democratic challenger tonight. By all measures, this is the first direct referendum on him this year. So no matter the outcome of a rigged Senate impeachment trial this week, _keep faith._ It's our vote and our voice that gets the final say on the Trump Presidency. And I have no doubt that we will come together on November 3, 2020 to defeat him and all he stands for. \- Joe | I'm running for Senate because Massachusetts deserves a leader who will do more than just vote the right way. It's time we build up a party, a nation, of individuals that can take on the vitriol of Donald Trump. We must defeat him, and defeat him soundly, to show the world we do not stand for his values.

[**Make a contribution now so we can win our primary in September -- then go on to take the fight directly to Donald Trump and what he represents.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390373/55b66746/22093df4/80ff20b/3004625671/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?recurring=1&refcode=2020-02-03-impeachment")

clean_body: | "" | | by no means is this a slow news week: Iowa caucus results tonight, the State of the Union tomorrow, and on Wednesday the Senate will vote on the impeachment of Donald Trump. While it all may seem overwhelming, we have to remember: at the end of the day, we, the people, are the deciders of our fate. Because we have the ultimate power - our vote. Our collective voices will begin to choose Donald Trump's Democratic challenger tonight. By all measures, this is the first direct referendum on him this year. So no matter the outcome of a rigged Senate impeachment trial this week, keep faith. It's our vote and our voice that gets the final say on the Trump Presidency. And I have no doubt that we will come together on November 3, 2020 to defeat him and all he stands for. \- Joe | I'm running for Senate because Massachusetts deserves a leader who will do more than just vote the right way. It's time we build up a party, a nation, of individuals that can take on the vitriol of Donald Trump. We must defeat him, and defeat him soundly, to show the world we do not stand for his values. "" If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137. Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? "". | Team,

I'm not taking a dollar from corporate PACs. That means this is an entirely people-powered campaign. | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa18d/18d6a294/4cc7d062/26d62f9c/2281246171/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDAyMDMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200203?refcode=jme200203_nd&recurring=true")

Thank you again.

James

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: What Donald Trump Jr. has to say about our race
body:
We just released a new campaign ad featuring... Peter,We just released a new campaign ad featuring Donald Trump Jr.'s incredible endorsement:_" For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary tells you all you need to know about the man. He needs people like Bill Hagerty to be in there and to support him. He can't do it alone. Let's make sure to get this man to the United States Senate." - _Donald Trump Jr.[**Watch the ad and help us keep it on the air!**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ntkzg-akrkktjik-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ntkzg-akrkktjik-y/) [Watch Our New TV Ad](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ntkzg-akrkktjik-j/) The support we've received from President Trump and his family is incredibly humbling. I'm honored to have them on our team. name: Tom Steyer
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Thank you, from the bottom of my heart. To all the dedicated Iowans who showed up for me tonight, I'm proud to have you in my corner. This marks a beginning -- we're still in the first leg of this race. I'm a firm believer that change always starts here, at the grassroots. Our message of climate action, a people-powered economy, and taking our government back from corporate control is hitting home in many hearts. People realize this is what we need to do to put our country back on the path to forward progress. They realize it's going to take a different kind of fight to beat Donald Trump in November. Even though results from tonight's caucuses are still coming in, we wanted to give this team an update on where we stand:

It's a tight contest. We won't know the final outcome for a while -- maybe not even until tomorrow. But we've now seen the strength of our grassroots movement in action -- turning out tens of thousands of caucus-goers across the state -- and we're in a great position to keep up the fight.

Our campaign has spent the past year meeting people where they are, talking with them about the issues that matter to them, and spreading Elizabeth's vision for big, structural change -- **and tonight's early results are a powerful indication that the campaign we're growing is working.**

The energy in Iowa is looking good -- and we'll be back with more updates from tonight's caucuses.

**But Iowa is just the beginning, and our campaign is built for the long haul. And right now, Elizabeth needs your help to continue our momentum into New Hampshire, Nevada, South Carolina, and all the 57 other states and territories across the country.**

**[Will you chip in $2 or whatever you can tonight to carry our campaign into the next primaries and caucuses?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852acae/45c30650/1fa994608/66e3eb5a/3145656443/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8xNEZfUkVTX1ZPVF9UXzIwMjAwMjAzX1YzUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO14F_RES_VOT_T_20200203_V3S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: It's a tight contest. The biggest task ahead for our team right now is to make sure we... | | | "" Even though results from tonight's caucuses are still coming in, we wanted to give this team an update on where we stand: It's a tight contest. We won't know the final outcome for a while -- maybe not even until tomorrow. But we've now seen the strength of our grassroots movement in action -- turning out tens of thousands of caucus-goers across the state -- and we're in a great position to keep up the fight. Our campaign has spent the past year meeting people where they are, talking with them about the issues that matter to them, and spreading Elizabeth's vision for big, structural change -- and tonight's early results are a powerful indication that the campaign we're growing is working. The energy in Iowa is looking good -- and we'll be back with more updates from tonight's caucuses. But Iowa is just the beginning, and our campaign is built for the long haul. And right now, Elizabeth needs your help to continue our momentum into New Hampshire, Nevada, South Carolina, and all the 57 other states and territories across the country. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Before I get on a plane to New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I hope you can read this tonight

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy) Yang Gang --

We're still waiting on the results in Iowa. But we know what's next.

**We’re going to keep defying expectations.**

When the debates began many months ago, there were 20 candidates who made it onto the stage. Later this week in New Hampshire, I will be one of seven remaining candidates in this race to be on the debate stage.

They expected us to never contend for the presidency. Yet we’ve already out-competed sitting senators and governors to be one of the few left standing.

They expected us to never build an operation to compete with established politicians. Yet more than 250 staffers and thousands of volunteers have dedicated their lives to this campaign.

They expected us not to have the money to compete, yet we’ve raised nearly $40 million from over 425,000 people in increments of just $30 since this race started.

**[Now, before I get on a plane to New Hampshire tonight, I have to make a personal ask of you. Will you give $10 tonight so we show everyone we will continue defying expectations all the way to the nomination?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24600?t=5&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24600?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24600?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24600?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24600?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24600?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24600?t=11&amount=25&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy)
---
This campaign has grown because of our drive to put Humanity First and build a better world for the next generation. I’m running so I can look Christopher and Damian in the eyes and tell them this country loves them, and we fought with everything we had to make sure their future is one of abundance.

Iowa was just the beginning. Tomorrow, we hit New Hampshire and continue building this wave all the way to the White House.

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24600?t=12&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=7064%2E377263%2EixTvuy) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

As your President, I promise you that I will always put America FIRST with every decision I make (something the Democrats don't know how to do). | Happy Monday! Last week was a busy week on the campaign trail. I went from Bristol to Waynesboro, making stops along the way. I started off the week out in Knoxville and made stops in Bristol, Johnson City, Kingsport, Lewis, Perry and Wayne. [Click here to see where we're going next!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjlydkl-uunkhiuw-y/) My parents immigrated to America, legally. If Republicans lose in 2020, we're going to have an illegal immigrant invasion. Democrats call anyone who talks about our crisis at the border racist. I'm not afraid to stand up to them and speak the truth. Watch our new ad below and be sure to share with your friends! [Watch Our Ad!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjlydkl-uunkhiuw-j/) **News:** Last week I had the honor of talking with conservative radio host Todd Starnes to discuss my run for US Senate, this impeachment sham, and the coronavirus. [Listen to my interview here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjlydkl-uunkhiuw-t/) **Social Media:** I need your help! In addition to releasing my new ad, I have picked up my petition to be on the ballot in August. As the conservative outsider in this race, I am running for the U.S. Senate to make a difference, a different kind of difference. Take a minute to sign my petition to show your support as we work to be on the ballot during the August Primary. [Sign the Petition!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjlydkl-uunkhiuw-i/) Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjlydkl-uunkhiuw-d/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjlydkl-uunkhiuw-h/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjlydkl-uunkhiuw-k/)! name: Genevieve Collins
subject: 🚨Sham Iowa Caucuses: Dems election meltdown 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wWC03by4X7ZNNlPi2I8HvYok2qLNozXn7W_qnc_5qIVjEfELtsdKcNvYkSVtHLtoe9aXRHNTSV6aKrgEUBl0NA7nqL58LkgaGZSoEq-XSO-BQWDOS330IrVUurc5Rk4upD785ytoRnNP3WYGtzC7U2EZi5HAEJQMnW2iaymbsCzYFT-q3PghBxhp8mNUm6yjQMEzzjor_Wg=&c=39_pwN4_5xyOGxRyQi3BpExi3rumSf4tg85Pj4AC8H00bzpA7KpsOQ==&ch=t4MqtKlD7VA7nMIhlQ79eRb1U03ek6TqjR-fWc1qHoEJa_GpCWatyw==)
---
| Peter,
The Democrat party still can't figure out who won the Iowa caucuses. Or maybe they know who won and are trying to figure out how to rig the election for someone else.
Even CNN and The New York Times admitted how bad this is for Dems.
Dems have a history of rigging the primary system for their favored candidates, but this is shady even for them! If they can't decide who won their caucuses, how can they expect to run a country? [Help me stop the Democrats and turn this district red!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wWC03by4X7ZNNlPi2I8HvYok2qLNozXn7W_qnc_5qIVjEfELtsdKcEPrSXedJBoxHNWDnDRNIFrnFm-0qNnDpne2p0o2K5OLu8W_UFKw1wWw6X-WVcakfRulGa4cIDbzxRQ3eBuX4WZy6IfL8AZy8ucJYyH0oKb-BLmCThHnpb8wk122uqvDU4GwLtjFM32eeANw5srjkH_MgoICf7LClG-jafxZhuiUaJzkWcKa6YBNXcNh7oOA1g==&c=39_pwN4_5xyOGxRyQi3BpExi3rumSf4tg85Pj4AC8H00bzpA7KpsOQ==&ch=t4MqtKlD7VA7nMIhlQ79eRb1U03ek6TqjR-fWc1qHoEJa_GpCWatyw==)
---
| We're in a battle for the very soul of our state and our nation. We must protect our conservative, free-market, pro-jobs, Texas way of life from the incompetent, socialist Democrats.
[I believe in the free market, conservative values, and defending our district from socialism!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wWC03by4X7ZNNlPi2I8HvYok2qLNozXn7W_qnc_5qIVjEfELtsdKcEPrSXedJBoxHNWDnDRNIFrnFm-0qNnDpne2p0o2K5OLu8W_UFKw1wWw6X-WVcakfRulGa4cIDbzxRQ3eBuX4WZy6IfL8AZy8ucJYyH0oKb-BLmCThHnpb8wk122uqvDU4GwLtjFM32eeANw5srjkH_MgoICf7LClG-jafxZhuiUaJzkWcKa6YBNXcNh7oOA1g==&c=39_pwN4_5xyOGxRyQi3BpExi3rumSf4tg85Pj4AC8H00bzpA7KpsOQ==&ch=t4MqtKlD7VA7nMIhlQ79eRb1U03ek6TqjR-fWc1qHoEJa_GpCWatyw==)
---
| | | [>> CONTRIBUTE TO STOP SOCIALISM <<](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wWC03by4X7ZNNlPi2I8HvYok2qLNozXn7W_qnc_5qIVjEfELtsdKcEPrSXedJBoxHNWDnDRNIFrnFm-0qNnDpne2p0o2K5OLu8W_UFKw1wWw6X-WVcakfRulGa4cIDbzxRQ3eBuX4WZy6IfL8AZy8ucJYyH0oKb-BLmCThHnpb8wk122uqvDU4GwLtjFM32eeANw5srjkH_MgoICf7LClG-jafxZhuiUaJzkWcKa6YBNXcNh7oOA1g==&c=39_pwN4_5xyOGxRyQi3BpExi3rumSf4tg85Pj4AC8H00bzpA7KpsOQ==&ch=t4MqtKlD7VA7nMIhlQ79eRb1U03ek6TqjR-fWc1qHoEJa_GpCWatyw==)
---
| America as we know it is truly under threat from the radical left. When you elect me to serve you in Congress, [you'll always be able to count on me to fight for your family, freedom, and our Texas values.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wWC03by4X7ZNNlPi2I8HvYok2qLNozXn7W_qnc_5qIVjEfELtsdKcEPrSXedJBoxHNWDnDRNIFrnFm-0qNnDpne2p0o2K5OLu8W_UFKw1wWw6X-WVcakfRulGa4cIDbzxRQ3eBuX4WZy6IfL8AZy8ucJYyH0oKb-BLmCThHnpb8wk122uqvDU4GwLtjFM32eeANw5srjkH_MgoICf7LClG-jafxZhuiUaJzkWcKa6YBNXcNh7oOA1g==&c=39_pwN4_5xyOGxRyQi3BpExi3rumSf4tg85Pj4AC8H00bzpA7KpsOQ==&ch=t4MqtKlD7VA7nMIhlQ79eRb1U03ek6TqjR-fWc1qHoEJa_GpCWatyw==) I hope I can count on you too!
---
| Thank you and God bless,

|

| Genevieve

| NH Senate Democrats Strip Free Market Economic Courses From NH Schools!
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Capitalism is _not_ a popular topic in the Democrat Party these days! Last week NH Senate Democrats unanimously voted to strip a requirement proposed by Republicans in an amendment to Senate Bill 583 that our schools teach: "**free market economics, geography and history** to enable (students) to participate in the democratic process and to make informed choices as responsible citizens in a constitutional republic." If that's not scary enough, in its place, this same piece of legislation **forces elementary schools to indoctrinate our students with a politically charged, anti-capitalism course about climate change**! Help us fight back! [Consider making a small donation of $15, $25 or even $100](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzQ4NDg2MDg0NzMxODY4Njc1JmM9djJ4MiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMTUwMjE3OTgmZD1uN3EwdDRv.dmgpFoohuZKHFzB-PNDU4ujl-t1F6YS4EANYPh4m5Gg) to the NH Senate Republicans so we can turn the Senate Republican Red once again!

body:
We’ve got good news and bad news. The good news is last quarter’s campaign finance disclosures are now public, and in 2019, we raised more than any other campaign in our race in terms of individual contributions. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3wA/ni0YAA/t.2yz/bAHKeNqnQPyBh5DeVsQlHA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PwiYlbBPRjFOetQ0X6RkG4HUOxYTcAWLC3aO2Q6-2BQFTbo46wntHzaiYlH7xjvcrVFfuYR0s9-2B66ZMnjtEmD15GTuGAXZ-2B6JG6Cjk2d0YdHAHUdjGyl1KMX24uyxoLviPaU-3D/Sw3b)
Friend, **** **** **** We’ve got good news and bad news. The good news is last quarter’s campaign finance disclosures are now public, and in 2019, we raised more than any other campaign in our race in terms of individual contributions. We’re so grateful to have real people behind our campaign. The bad news is two of our opponents are pumping many hundreds of thousands of dollars of their own money into their campaigns. One opponent, the son of a billionaire pharmaceutical executive, **_has already self-funded his campaign to the tune of $500,000 in 2019 alone_**. **A few days ago, he announced that he has already “raised” $1 million.**
Friend, we knew this would happen. We’ve been saying it for months.
It’s no secret our campaign finance system is broken. It’s hard enough for working-class people to run competitive campaigns, and it’s even more difficult when the super-rich are able to distort our democratic process by pumping limitless amounts of money into their campaigns. We don’t have billions, or even millions, but thankfully we have supporters like you. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us stand up to the candidates trying to buy this election?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3wA/ni0YAA/t.2yz/bAHKeNqnQPyBh5DeVsQlHA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJmmT1hHWJq7KRbS9Vs-2FBuyPlm1-2Fg8rS-2FY0UzoYpInwtdkqgPbkWtZka3D0voTK-2Fklk1TkwvG2AtZy1CMKwblP9RaaQ2E8M0UJhDHyaTWVF7UL6ZGMZ1xMPk7MX3KD-2BoVYr6sHv-2Fu5CX3-2Bj2Y7jN21lP5-2FkBZeLXp-2BlACfQhAgrhdPM4YW41LuNVQeeqL8gNo2muDbTgslcyKf-2BHb36-2BXFx/ri59)_**
[Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3wA/ni0YAA/t.2yz/bAHKeNqnQPyBh5DeVsQlHA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJmmT1hHWJq7KRbS9Vs-2FBuyyHJD4BkTJEFb22PpK3QZbDdMBzzR3nzQ2SqgmLrmmwuBIo0BJC7-2Bb4QRG-2BIatRn-2FEqsA2DYW6bQHNiWJT2RXaxKEXg5wy17mVDgrZPqvUHA4BuZKXox-2BDKeqyJ87n7mKO-2FuWKWyJ46F2qfPWie4cIQhwovR5yYx9vsFoHjdyirQncz9qR2qWn3GwCIDrjjuS/IBRI)
Our political system is rigged to benefit the privileged few at the expense of everyday people. We don’t need more billionaires in Congress. We need more people who know what it’s like to struggle just to get by in this broken economy. [**_Can we count on you to make a contribution to send a real champion for working people to Congress?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3wA/ni0YAA/t.2yz/bAHKeNqnQPyBh5DeVsQlHA/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJmmT1hHWJq7KRbS9Vs-2FBuyKrrFgf3Es0HDosXSEJT4Y-2F1220DmrPy5ovRgIYX8NSjx-2FFnd0hvIPlNEmXF3iNKgAU5fnetjyEbGGPMCC3PtSxhMhoyLkPaGVG5hCLewfj8L1vtD2Pq8CpfpURZvc-2F5ViSeKyBobvQHTgM0mQJHbiSpYNERkY-2FF5Wk4gvRRIA36Rlo8fPiK7rOyeh8HFNq8K/WIYf)
Team Mondaire **_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/3wA/ni0YAA/t.2yz/bAHKeNqnQPyBh5DeVsQlHA/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIAKzbJK1DvqxeK-2BADPGoEkLwCgC14o2R9JijYEXS9Pn3XahL4Ck3xx5kmFZNVNHIpAhTuk0lkAb6PMVnr5TGtQe-2F-2FUkVD5UorUjkukMqebDQtpvbGU8rbr78fwhFqGkr7IKvwJLbTIyTm2k1ydyQJtARpVqZ-2FJcgGMXk7ltHg2jBx96B6nHSro1RYtG9rlbWp5QBJL-2FwRKehUmXDEF19fW/rupo)_**

subject: Trump + NH (Rapid Response update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc4ab/2a380d31/228f6fc6/f0f554/4248734314/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc4ab/2a380d31/228f6fc6/f0f554/4248734314/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
We'll be fast --
Donald Trump is coming to New Hampshire the day before the primary to rally Republicans in support of an ultraconservative agenda, and to smear and disparage Granite State Democrats like Senator Hassan.
**[We've almost reached our two-day, $10,000 Rapid Response goal to help protect this vulnerable Senate seat, and $3 (or more!) from you this morning could be the thing that gets us over the top. name: Megan West
subject: Fostering Hope in the City of Sin
body:
| | Peter, It’s easy to identify a problem in our society, but it is far more challenging to be part of the solution. Carly Souza has set out to do just that. At the tender age of eight, Carly witnessed a classmate’s adoption and it made a lasting imprint on her heart. Watching that journey unfold, Carly knew that one day she wanted to adopt. Little did she understand then just how profound that dream would become. Fast forward to today. Carly and her husband, John, have seven incredible children; five by the gift of adoption through foster care and two by birth. She’s also leading Fostering Hope, a Las Vegas church-based ministry she founded in 2012. [Read the rest of this incredible story](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvMAvhCEkwfUbd08y8x7BZyEF3U9PIgGtrcfSLvySkpU_wycVv9Pffggk1A7yz4lusk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200204com01&n=1) of how one person is answering the biblical mandate to care for the orphaned (James 1:27). You’ll be inspired by her obedience, faith, and the profound impact she is making in her community. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvMAvhCEkwfUbd08y8x7BZyEF3U9PIgGtrcfSLvySkpU_wycVv9Pffggk1A7yz4lusk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200204com01&n=2) Do Good. Go Vote. Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200204com01&n=3)

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: This is all just an act. Senator Collins just needed cover while she's up for reelection.
body:
Look, Collins waited until AFTER Lamar Alexander announced he was voting...

Friends,
Senator Collins said in an interview she is "disappointed" the Senate did not vote to allow witness testimony. _Sound familiar?_
We can always count on Susan Collins to be "disappointed" but we can never count on her to actually stand up to Mitch McConnell.
We saw that when she waited until AFTER McConnell gave her a "hall pass" before voting for witness testimony. And when she voted against an amendment to subpoena John Bolton, Mick Mulvaney, and other key witnesses.
**This is all just an act. Senator Collins just needed cover while she 's up for reelection.**
We're sick and tired of watching McConnell and Collins perform this kind of political theater. If you are too:
**[Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign before the Senate votes on impeachment tomorrow. With your help, we will hit our $100,000 fundraising goal.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580291d/4bef7a87/6d7127e0/287fbed4/2234414951/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDQtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200204-1-b")**
**********[DONATE NOW](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580291d/4bef7a87/6d7127e0/287fbed4/2234414951/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDQtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200204-1-b")**********
When it really counts, Susan Collins will always put Mitch McConnell ahead of Mainers. That's not going to change -- so we have to replace her in the Senate.
\- Team Sara

South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Michael Bennet
subject: re: Chaos in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| While chaos emerged in Iowa last night, I was in New Hampshire holding a town hall and talking to voters.

I've made it clear that my flag is planted in New Hampshire, and I need to do well in the primary next week to have the momentum and the money to go into Nevada, South Carolina, Super Tuesday, and beyond.

[New Hampshire's politics are a lot like Colorado's, almost evenly divided among Democrats, Independents, and Republicans. That's why I've committed to spend more time here than any other candidate and have an agenda, The Real Deal, that has broad appeal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaac9/134673f2/37b3f17d/699722f0/3183936528/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I've made it clear that my flag is planted in New Hampshire, and I need to do well in the primary next week to have the momentum and the money to go into Nevada, South Carolina, Super Tuesday, and beyond. "" "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Instead of talking about what the Democratic Party will do for the American people and how we will improve their lives, we're talking about an app. This is just one more distraction. "" I hope you'll stand with me when I need you the most. "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for everything, Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: I’m proud to endorse Adem Bunkeddeko for Congress
body:
Peter,

I’m endorsing Adem Bunkeddeko for Congress! Like me, Adem is fighting back against the corrupting power of corporate money in our politics, and he’s not afraid of taking on the establishment to get it done. He’s exactly the type of leader that Brooklyn deserves, and I’m so proud to be standing alongside him today.

>From vowing to help overturn Citizens United to joining me in advocating for democracy vouchers, I know that Adem will work tirelessly in Congress to restore power to the people. But it’s going to take a huge movement, right here at home, to send a true progressive to Washington. So will you join me in supporting Adem today?

Best,

Zephyr

P.S. Want to learn more? You can read about Adem here! https://ademforcongress.com

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: =?utf-8?Q?True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Free and Fair Elections need you - are you ready?
body:
True the Vote's 2020 Plan calling all veterans and first responders | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=9b1affcd5f&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=26af8a5166&e=ad8cba7e98) | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=e7708daccd&e=ad8cba7e98)
---|---
| Are you ready?
---

Are you ready to roll up your sleeves and get to work for free and fair 2020 elections?

Tonight is the President’s State of the Union address, the Senate is schedule to vote tomorrow on the impeachment proceedings - and last night in Iowa we witnessed the chaos that ensues when untested voting "solutions" are forced by establishment juggernauts, rather than allowing citizens to control the election process themselves.

It’s like the starting gun for the beginning of the 2020 race. The next 9 months are going to be wild!

True the Vote is ramping back up - and we have some amazing programs in store that will help YOU take back control of your elections. We cannot wait until the last minute to mobilize. Real problems exist our the voting process, and history shows it’s up to us – the citizens – to address them!

| | |
---

| |
---

CALLING ALL VETERANS AND FIRST RESPONDERS
CONTINUE TO SERVE

[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c28273b685&e=ad8cba7e98)

**Meet True the Vote's newest teammember,**
**Ed Hiner, Navy SEAL Lieutenant Commander (Ret.)**
| NEW OPPORTUNITIES TO CONNECT
---

Can you think of any better protector of the sanctity of our votes than veterans and first responders? If you are a veteran or have otherwise served (or are serving) as a first responder, retired Navy SEAL Lieutenant Commander Ed Hiner is coordinating volunteer efforts though our new **Continue to Serve** operations. **[To sign up click here. ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ebe9fcf047&e=ad8cba7e98) **
Let's Stay Connected! Please "subscribe", “like” or “follow” these pages! **[Fa cebook](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=9444df697e&e=ad8cba7e98) [Twitter](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=30e08a6781&e=ad8cba7e98) [YouTube](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=7c7b078220&e=ad8cba7e98) [Instagram](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=fcfcc4bdaa&e=ad8cba7e98)**
The state of our union depends on every one of us. Join us as we ramp up for free and fair elections in 2020!
Onward - Catherine Engelbrecht True the Vote Founder
**[PS. We rely on donations to keep going. Thank you in advance for any donation you can make, no matter the size. There's much work to be done - if you can, please donate to the cause!](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=25ca7d94ef&e=ad8cba7e98)**
Donations made to True the Vote are tax deductible.
True the Vote is a 501c3 nonprofit organization, Federal Tax I.D. #27-2860095

| | PO Box 3109 #19128
Houston, TX 77253-3109
713.401.6017

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Thanks to Trump, America is Winning Like Never Before
body:
"A recap of the past month presents a snapshot of President Trump’s first term. We are stronger and safer..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea4e09205a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Thanks to Trump, America is Winning Like Never Before**

“A recap of the past month presents a snapshot of President Trump’s first term. We are stronger and safer, and the ripple effects of renewed prosperity are being felt nationwide. Within a few short weeks, this administration went after notorious terrorists, signed two major trade initiatives, unveiled a Middle East peace plan and gave Americans reassurance that the next century will be ours,” House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy writes in Fox News.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75c010799a&e=3ee4985eea)

🚨**BREAKING:**[President Trump’s job approval hits new record high!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8bf8cc6d7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement, which recently passed both houses of Congress by overwhelming, bipartisan majorities, has been rightly hailed as one of President Donald Trump’s most historic achievements.” Even better, unlike NAFTA, a sunset clause in USMCA guarantees that it won’t become unbalanced and outdated over time, Senior Advisor Jared Kushner writes for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7a67769e46&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The politically powerful should not deprive children of a great education, and no child in America should be on a waitlist for success. That is why President Trump has called on Congress to pass Education Freedom Scholarships. The bill currently before Congress is a federal tax credit that would provide families with more educational opportunities,” Joe Grogan, White House Domestic Policy Council Director, writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e6d0a70fe6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump has tapped Georgia pastor Tony Lowden “to be the new ‘reentry czar,’ a position created in the White House to help former inmates find housing, employment and other opportunities to provide ‘second chances’ for success after they leave prison,” Francesca Chambers reports for [_McClatchy DC_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce0cafdd18&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd9adbc04e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97bffccdf1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0087bc416c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
With your support, we reached our first monthly fundraising goal of this critical election year.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200204-ty?refcode=em200204-ty&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend -- I can't thank you enough.

Time and again, folks like you come through when it matters most. And with your support, we reached our first monthly fundraising goal of this critical election year.

I believe so strongly in the work we are doing together. I'm sure you do, too -- and it's clear from your response to messages just like these.

Every dollar you give toward important goals (like this one!) allows us to build a strong grassroots campaign that can go toe-to-toe with the other side and win.

**Now look, we cannot afford to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second.**

Our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and flip the majority will be one of the most consequential tasks of our lifetimes. Democrats can only flip the majority if we hold strong right here, and you're doing your part to make it happen.

If we continue at this pace, I know we will be in a strong position to win re-election and defend our values in Washington.

These next few months will not be easy but knowing I have you alongside me every step of the way gives me comfort -- and it gives me hope that we can truly go the distance in this race.

Thank you for everything. I appreciate your support more than you know.

-- Tina | [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200204-ty?refcode=em200204-ty&amount=10&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&")

name: Team Hunt
subject: What are local conservative leaders saying about Wesley Hunt?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

With Washington stuck in the partisan muck, we need new leaders to step up and carry the conservative torch forward. Wesley is the kind of tough combat veteran that we need to actually get the job done and protect our way of life.

But don’t take our word for it! What are other conservative leaders saying about Wesley?

_“Wesley Hunt is a strong leader who has dedicated his time in military service and volunteer work to protecting our country and improving the Houston area._In the race for the Seventh Congressional District in Texas, I am proud to endorse Wesley Hunt.”__

**-Senator Ted Cruz**

_“Wesley Hunt is a warrior and patriot. He’s put his life on the line for the freedom that we enjoy every day. He’s also a conservative who won’t be afraid to confront the liberals in Congress who target President Trump and conservatives across the country on a daily basis. We need soldiers like Wesley in Congress. _That’s why I’m endorsing Wesley in the 7th Congressional District._ ”_

**-Michael Berry, KTRH 740AM**

“Wesley Hunt is the exact type of leader that we need representing Houston in Washington. He’s a conservative who’s spent his life fighting for this country and is prepared to do whatever it takes to defend us against enemies foreign and domestic. _I proudly endorse Wesley Hunt in the 7th Congressional District._ ”

**-Former Rep. Ted Poe**

_“As a combat veteran, Wesley has proven himself to be a leader willing to put his own life on the line to protect our freedom and liberty. In his personal life, he’s shown himself to be a conservative willing to stand up against higher taxes and the radical left._I proudly endorse Wesley Hunt in the 7th District because we need leaders like him in Congress._ ”_
**
-Commissioner Jack Cagle**

_“I have had the pleasure of knowing Wesley Hunt for more than 20 years. Throughout his life, he has shown that he is willing to do whatever it takes to protect this country and keep our citizens safe. On top of that, Wesley is a conservative who will stand up for the good governance principles that Washington so sorely needs. Wesley is the person we need in Washington to fight for funding to prevent future flooding, keep our taxes low and protect us from threats. _I proudly endorse Wesley in the 7th Congressional District._ ”_

**-Commissioner Steve Radack**

[Click here to join our team today!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=92964677ddce417a87254de449e60921&_e=8BA0S2YxtFkv6OJQJtWNA5-IgH6Bhn03E7V3Rf1BFjMIXwmbJ0xoXLnAtHlCSU_IvjBNCxL0l_wLjfENfzjXWizeas76do2S-qIGF-ADDSy8tukgbHVaebWP36P95p-vHlVRvD0N081rv6V9UXtvT4Lkd1_hnvoXyCQrKhvBaRvjKirkE1FZzxR2YiZscSeHnow_nN-75O0DQx50CUP8XsPiyg9bIu4Adl23mwgi6No4wtqbfJeHlrrVfAS2E-ObILb_JCjQPhtcu5L_s2y68w%3D%3D)

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=92964677ddce417a87254de449e60921&_e=8BA0S2YxtFkv6OJQJtWNA27ST_4Gh19K9Osx1wdQVxM1qHH05ZbnvKGfgU2rTjjNay8HwLDulrah6OvqIHz8rO6ClcVeSyhUDkJSG0sX5KG2mIYONzePxu6xNMTYfMe_xYxHTc8xH4T6xvoJK3tU5uydAeqm9ddORu4AgY5cq55DUvo4OWbLlnu9awjjxNHlw0P35FpTK0gjx1VFi369lTLZp72AFst7I9VFRsPW704_4GRcF59oGHY1-_g5wGFvPbPIOH2zO_pY2YINpgxcbmaPCrF0jrOAvh5g8rW03Xk%3D)****

name: MJ Hegar Campaign HQ
subject: Sen. Cornyn sold out our health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Why is a dark money group thanking him for opposing a reform that would lower costs by billions of dollars?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890457/7f51f7bc/4d7f6286/4ef05746/796509176/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890457/7f51f7bc/4d7f6286/4ef05745/796509176/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200203.1nd__863__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
Peter -- Senator Cornyn got another windfall from a dark money group that's already spent **more than $2 million** on ads in Texas. And they've spent even more to thank him for _opposing_ legislation that would _lower_ health care costs!
And this isn't the first time Sen. Cornyn has turned his back on us, selling out our health care to the powerful special interests.
* Sen. Cornyn voted _18 times_ to repeal the Affordable Care Act.
* He voted _against_ a bill that would have lowered prescription drug costs.
* He voted to allow insurance companies to _charge older Texans more_ for coverage.
* He supported a lawsuit that would strike down the entire ACA, _including protections for people with pre-existing conditions!_

---
[**HELP MJ DEFEAT SEN. CORNYN >>>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890457/7f51f7bc/4d7f6286/4ef05745/796509176/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200203.1nd__863__&amount=10&recurring=true")
As a combat veteran who took gunfire during her service and a working mom who had two difficult pregnancies, **MJ understands that _everyone_ needs access to quality, affordable care.** She'll fight to make sure every Texan can get the care they need -- but she needs your support to win this race!

body:
I know there are reasons to feel frustrated and discouraged. Yesterday we had a bumpy democratic process. Tonight a lawless president will deliver his State of the Union. Tomorrow Republicans... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852acc3/45c30650/1fa78637f/66e3905b/4133781873/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

As you all know, we still don't have the official results from Iowa yesterday.

But there are a few things that we do know:

* We know that people counted us out in Iowa for months -- but we had a great night last night.
* It's a tight three way race at the top.
* And we're one of three candidates who will take home most of the delegates from Iowa -- and we're feeling good.

I know there are reasons to feel frustrated and discouraged. Yesterday we had a bumpy democratic process. Tonight a lawless president will deliver his State of the Union. Tomorrow Republicans in the Senate will likely declare that their loyalty is to Donald Trump rather than our Constitution and the rule of law.

**But this is not the time to give in to cynicism.

Next week is the first in the nation primary here in New Hampshire. And after that we have 55 more states and territories with their voices still to be heard. This is the beginning of a long journey, and I need your help in this fight.**

**[Can you make a donation of $2 right now to help power our grassroots movement forward?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852acc3/45c30650/1fa78637f/66e3905a/4133781873/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8yMEZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMjA0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO20F_EGR_EWD_E_20200204_V1S2_P")**

>
Look, it's been easy to find reasons to be discouraged these last few years -- as Democrats, as Americans. Reasons to give up and not bother. But when the future is uncertain and so much feels at risk, what I know -- in my heart and down to my bones -- is that the hard work matters. Every phone call. Every knocked door. Every vote. Every donation. Winning starts by showing up. And grassroots Democrats in Iowa showed up.

There is no time for fear. There is no time for discouragement. There is only time to dig deep and find courage. To commit to unity and common purpose. And to do the hard work that everyone in this party knows we need to do to beat Donald Trump.

**[If Democrats are going to win, all of us need to be a part of it. That's the party I promise to lead as our nominee: united, strong, and victorious-- but it only works if we fight side by side. Please chip in right now to help grow our movement.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852acc3/45c30650/1fa78637f/66e3905a/4133781873/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8yMEZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMjA0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO20F_EGR_EWD_E_20200204_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Greg Stanton
subject: let's bridge our divides
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ftUZdvZ4DNrzKm92DaDRoGuuP-ykfg9JDX7FC3oTMy4=/EA9kw70mk7HJOyiizFkvoLHnlLdj7RqWy2UMyZC89iU=?refcode=X_020420_InfrastructureSOTU_A&amount=50&recurring=auto)

**Last week, I was excited to unveil with my colleagues in Congress our "Moving Forward" plan to reinvest $760 billion over the next five years in a robust improvement of our nation's infrastructure, which will generate over 10 million new jobs. **

This infrastructure improvement plan is a commonsense approach to repairing our roads and bridges, improving our water infrastructure, and building out our sustainable transportation systems, like Phoenix's Valley Metro Light Rail.

[**CHIP IN -- Support my efforts to build robust infrastructure for Arizona >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ftUZdvZ4DNrzKm92DaDRoGuuP-ykfg9JDX7FC3oTMy4=/EA9kw70mk7HJOyiizFkvoLHnlLdj7RqWy2UMyZC89iU=?refcode=X_020420_InfrastructureSOTU_A&amount=50&recurring=auto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ftUZdvZ4DNrzKm92DaDRoGuuP-ykfg9JDX7FC3oTMy4=/hiZvlumSG1VHpSMKJXlLnHod1Zp1K9r5qUxRFDfwq3w=?refcode=X_020420_InfrastructureSOTU_A&amount=50&recurring=auto)

That's why today I called on President Donald Trump to use his State of the Union address tonight to bridge our national divides and announce his support for our "Moving Forward" infrastructure plan that will grow our economy and build a sustainable national future.

**Look, now more than ever we need the Administration and Congressional leaders to put aside their differences to make critical investments in our infrastructure and I am prepared to do the hard work in Washington to make that happen.**

[**If you support my leadership in working to collaboratively build out 21st Century infrastructure across the country, will you chip in today to my re-election campaign? DONATE »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ftUZdvZ4DNrzKm92DaDRoGuuP-ykfg9JDX7FC3oTMy4=/hiZvlumSG1VHpSMKJXlLnHod1Zp1K9r5qUxRFDfwq3w=?refcode=X_020420_InfrastructureSOTU_A&amount=50&recurring=auto)

clean_body: Last week, I was excited to unveil with my colleagues in Congress our "Moving Forward" plan to reinvest $760 billion over the next five years in a robust improvement of our nation's infrastructure, which will generate over 10 million new jobs. This infrastructure improvement plan is a commonsense approach to repairing our roads and bridges, improving our water infrastructure, and building out our sustainable transportation systems, like Phoenix's Valley Metro Light Rail. That's why today I called on President Donald Trump to use his State of the Union address tonight to bridge our national divides and announce his support for our "Moving Forward" infrastructure plan that will grow our economy and build a sustainable national future. Look, now more than ever we need the Administration and Congressional leaders to put aside their differences to make critical investments in our infrastructure and I am prepared to do the hard work in Washington to make that happen. Thank you for supporting my commonsense vision for our shared American future, \-- Greg_ Paid for by Stanton for Congress Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. name: EdMarkey.com
subject: There is no better way to restore our faith in this country, the world and our democracy than by choosing to take political action.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
There's a lot going on, and it may feel like there's not much good news.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de5b/693b8b0a/4356ae8d/72de4b16/4178713543/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
You might be pretty angry today. We get it. There's a lot going on, and it may feel like there's not much good news.
Yes, we could give in to that anger, concern, or hopelessness. We can stew about how the impeachment trial was handled or the lies that Donald Trump is certainly going to spout at tonight's State of the Union. We can let frustration with last night's caucuses get the best of us. And with these choices, we could accept a path of defeat.
**Or we can choose to do something about it.**
We can act today -- right now -- to build a brighter, better future for all of us. We can recognize the existential threats created by the climate crisis and Donald Trump and realize that we each have the power to do something about it.
There is no better way to restore our faith in this country, the world, and our democracy than by choosing to take political action.
We cannot agonize, we must organize.
We're hoping you'll choose to stand with us and fight for progressive ideas by making a donation to our campaign. But the choice is yours:
[**Will you make a donation to our campaign today to keep Ed in the fight for our progressive ideas? There 's never been a more important time to have his leadership in the Senate.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de5b/693b8b0a/4356ae8d/72de4b15/4178713543/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDQtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200204-c")
Thank you for being part of our movement. 2020 is going to be the most important election year of our lifetime, and Ed has never been more optimistic about our future.
Our ideas are winning, and this year we have the chance to demand and make real change. Together, we will get it done.
\- Team Markey
********[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de5b/693b8b0a/4356ae8d/72de4b15/4178713543/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDQtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200204-c")********

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de5b/693b8b0a/4356ae8d/72de4b14/4178713543/VEsC/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de5b/693b8b0a/4356ae8d/72de4b6b/4178713543/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

name: Yang2020
subject: Make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2) Yang Gang --

Andrew landed in New Hampshire at 4:00 AM this morning, and he’s already hitting the trail, getting the Granite State fired up for the primary on February 11.

While we don’t have final results, we saw thousands begin the wave in Iowa last night. And that wave is going to keep building in New Hampshire, making it bigger and stronger than before.

[We need you to pitch in $10 or anything you can right now to ensure we are successful in the New Hampshire primary: ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=5&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=11&amount=25&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2)
---
This is it. Right now.

**We are the wave coming for Washington that will bring sweeping Humanity First change to our country in the time when we need it the most.**

It’s up to each and every one of us to put every ounce of support behind Andrew and our movement if we’re going to do what we came to do -- to make our government one that recognizes and values every American.

[We need you and every last person in the Yang Gang to contribute $10 or more now -- we can’t let Andrew down when he needs us the most. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=12&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2)

With you, Yang Gang, we can make New Hampshire and this entire movement a success -- and we will make it to the White House.

Let’s make history.

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24611?t=13&akid=7065%2E377263%2EON54t2)
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I’m about to go on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Minutes away from my EPIC State of the Union Address. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d64f4fc867fb6e8fa932ee0c4d1581f4828db09f85ac9f4521f9f75ea889e424b65676683592e55dff5efaa6942f3904be8e77f72d130d27)
---

Friend,
In a few minutes, I’m going to stand before Congress, the Nation, and the World to deliver my **State of the Union Address.**

Tonight, I'm going to share with you what's really going on in Washington - something that the Fake News media will never tell you. _The truth is, while my administration is creating jobs and killing terrorists, the Radical Left is obsessed with demented hoaxes, crazy Witch Hunts, and deranged partisan crusades._

---
| They're trying to stop OUR NATION from winning in November. We can't let that happen.

**Last year, tens of thousands of American Patriots contributed to get on our _Official State of the Union Donor List_ where their names were broadcast LIVE during my State of the Union Address.**

**I told you that I want to have a RECORD-BREAKING 100,000 American names displayed for the entire Nation to see this year, and I want YOURS to be one of them.**

There's still time left to contribute to get on the list, but you have to act **IMMEDIATELY.**

---
| **[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to have your name proudly displayed LIVE during the State of the Union Address and to get on the Official State of the Union Donor List.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b87e1f93c6047cf06299ed34977defde0454e7b221da6cc504e947da8b9146e10bb01f7c7af8a51c8bfae3ade2b04848aa20604c1326a9d1)**

Nothing will trigger the Left more than seeing the names of THOUSANDS of Patriots from across the country broadcast LIVE during my **State of the Union Address.** Let's show them that the State of OUR Union is STRONGER THAN EVER BEFORE.

My Campaign Manager, Brad, is giving me the FINAL **State of the Union Donor List** when I finish my speech - will I see your name?

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT immediately to get on the list Brad hands me.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b87e1f93c6047cf0eb76e970eb0eb40c1f57e006df913602284195b74daa255077cc571c5a06c2a558764d180863e0fdf6a0a232ba2d5bf5)**

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: On this campaign, every voice counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390377/55b66746/2215fa04/80ff01a/3030880667/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | this weekend we held the first Spanish-language-only town halls in Massachusetts Senate history. [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390377/55b66746/2215fa04/80ff01b/3030880667/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-04-slrecap&recurring=1&amount=3") We didn't do this for the press, or the tweets, or the pundits. We did this because I made a promise to Massachusetts voters on day one:___I will show up._ **No matter the color of your skin, god of your prayers, hand that you hold, or language that you speak -- _on this campaign, you count._** Latinx voters across our Commonwealth - and country - have made immense contributions to every corner of American life. So they should be heard. In their community. In their language. Direct, honest, and unfiltered. These were the first two Spanish-only town halls - but they will not be the last. We'll keep showing up. Not just when the cameras are there. Not just for votes. But I will show up over and over (until folks are sick of me) because it matters. The people of Massachusetts deserve a Senator who is going to be an active member of our lives. A Senator they know and recognize. A Senator who will fight like hell for us in Washington, and at the end of the week come home, tell you all about it, and listen to your feedback. It would be the honor of my life to be that Senator. To win this race. And I'm grateful for your support as we try to achieve that, together. \- Joe If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly. | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390377/55b66746/2215fa04/80ff024/3030880667/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-02-04-slrecap&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390377/55b66746/2215fa04/80ff025/3030880667/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-02-04-slrecap&refcode2=express-buttons")

Direct, honest, and unfiltered. These were the first two Spanish-only town halls - but they will not be the last. We'll keep showing up. Not just when the cameras are there. Not just for votes. But I will show up over and over (until folks are sick of me) because it matters. The people of Massachusetts deserve a Senator who is going to be an active member of our lives. A Senator they know and recognize. A Senator who will fight like hell for us in Washington, and at the end of the week come home, tell you all about it, and listen to your feedback. It would be the honor of my life to be that Senator. To win this race. And I'm grateful for your support as we try to achieve that, together. \- Joe If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly. | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". body:

| | | | | |

| Friend,
Stunning incompetence. That's what was on display during the Democrats' Iowa caucus debacle last night. It is one thing for Democrats to mess up their own Iowa caucuses, but it would be a real tragedy to let them take full control of our government.
---
| | | [Don't Let the Democrats Take Control](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ODkbU-duK0jEWCiYi7IzqFdwwxwQl9YRzMN5W0z_wSgO_C_bY_vwFXzx1dW7Evga4qoVEuV-Un_PqtlnBwrKAEglg1tdvI_oqYXOgBJYdJeQXeuGw7mra9NuDNdjivBUckM0vVhpaIzKRIicF6UrGsFyY7hYErxvkNDvALKk1yylrcHdVR2MSw==&c=jfJVpjbrhcozX-RG6rH7-5Pkx_GNJ7xESH60UzJvWAwPWT03F9qSXA==&ch=FtcGtf6BQo9MPq9dVeyXe0sS9UIpq1PCQitToNmSIFbNrfHXJKO71Q==)

Thank you for your support,

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Schiff must go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017qPGxuqZkoAWIJNLOLuFuw8dkD5Z10CXcWIPcNM5K8dpS6DETqJsB4TouUM3Sh4YKZ_knIjb9EPQUl0haRPzXrZFSnl0ymfum9nKOq9mPMf2tsWwE0b79SgYJZ6TB2_4D6iEC2eIrZ0fm1CvnUIgCos1VJV7jNQk5PEA8cfTbNL0Pl8I1bLSFQ==&c=69zKXB4nb1RiBYHvfcGoUeBLnVtz3wSyzZeAEdJ_tgfNcSY-thws0Q==&ch=E2uROTBvFp9RhXZrYSH_yUyw2JPX5I3ipNR1UlKiWu7Y-m-_YFkVZQ==)

| Patriot,
Adam Schiff doesn't understand how to let go. His obsession over removing President Trump from office is disturbing, especially after finding no obstructions and no collusion during the House impeachment sham.
Despite a complete lack of evidence against our President, the Schiff Show continues in the Senate.
Anyone following the sham impeachment process knows that President Trump will be acquitted of all charges and that it will die in the Senate. When this happens, I firmly believe that Adam Schiff should be removed from House Leadership for wasting the American people's time and making a mockery of the office of the President.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017qPGxuqZkoAWIJNLOLuFuw8dkD5Z10CXcWIPcNM5K8dpS6DETqJsB4TouUM3Sh4YKZ_knIjb9EPQUl0haRPzXrZFSnl0ymfum9nKOq9mPMf2tsWwE0b79SgYJZ6TB2_4D6iEC2eIrZ0fm1CvnUIgCos1VJV7jNQk5PEA8cfTbNL0Pl8I1bLSFQ==&c=69zKXB4nb1RiBYHvfcGoUeBLnVtz3wSyzZeAEdJ_tgfNcSY-thws0Q==&ch=E2uROTBvFp9RhXZrYSH_yUyw2JPX5I3ipNR1UlKiWu7Y-m-_YFkVZQ==)
---
| The joke of impeachment has dragged on for far too long. Join me in flipping the House in 2020 so that Adam Schiff can be removed from his leadership position.

| God bless President Trump,

|

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Donald Trump is in it for himself (not you)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2fb8c/6cd27893/5308cf83/1586413f/2023872105/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | When Donald Trump gives the State of the Union address tonight, he's going to make grandiose claims about what he's accomplished, when the truth is anything but. We are in the midst of an impeachment trial that, above all else, proves one thing: That Donald Trump is in it for himself. Again and again, he has used the levers of government to enrich himself, his family, and his friends; to put his thumb on the scales of justice; and expand his own power and that of his corporate cronies. And he's bent the entire Republican Party to his will, demanding total loyalty and subservience. Meanwhile, critical reforms that the American people expect are being ignored (or worse.) **One example? The cost of prescription drugs.** Everywhere I go, I hear from people who tell me that life-saving drugs they depend on are skyrocketing in cost. They're being forced to make painful choices--cutting pills in half, skipping treatment, going without meals, delaying other bills, even declaring bankruptcy. **The profiteering from Big Pharma has gotten out of control, and Donald Trump won't push back, won't fight for the American people.** Not only has Donald Trump been unwilling to take on the pharmaceutical industry, he even used his renegotiation of NAFTA to give Big Pharma a windfall at the expense of American, Canadian, and Mexican consumers. Luckily Congressional Democrats forced that provision out of the final deal, but it shows you who this president cares about. **I've got a better idea.** Pharmaceutical companies should be barred from selling prescription drugs in America for more than the average price in Europe, Canada, and Japan. Period. Stop gouging American consumers -- it's a straightforward and simple idea. It would help the American people. If we want those kinds of common-sense solutions, we need to make this Donald Trump's last State of the Union. Together, we are building a grassroots movement to take back the White House, take back the Senate, and get America back on track. We can do this. Onward. name: Mike Thompson
subject: In less than an hour
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/O1znf8geHb5LXdR9CNU0jwxjN9NmPo1lmDpTb7gwICM=/UZOEC4TWiERskH0DEgVBMTIC2oiMxaEQdwnSPsFuo1c=?refcode=MT_EM_PT_WL_200204_1_1&amount=25&recurring=1)
Peter,

In less than an hour, President Trump will deliver this year's State of the Union address.

With the issue of health care on our minds, I am honored to bring a guest tonight who tirelessly works to secure health care for all. As a person with a pre-existing condition, my guest took his personal struggles with the health care system and channeled them into advocacy. I'm proud that he's a Californian, and proud that he'll be my State of the Union guest tonight.

**Will you stand with us ahead of tonight 's speech and tell the President that access to affordable health care is a human right? [Sign on now. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/O1znf8geHb5LXdR9CNU0jwxjN9NmPo1lmDpTb7gwICM=/X07lV56J5yfdFo0_GYpzLhg2byKERd9RHNNBbNL80tk=)**

As Americans, it should not be a privilege, but a right to have access to affordable health care. While we've made strides in recent years, too many people in our country still can't get the health care they need.

No matter what the president says tonight, I know that this team stands together to fight for our human rights.

Thank you for standing with us,

Mike Thompson

* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/O1znf8geHb5LXdR9CNU0jwxjN9NmPo1lmDpTb7gwICM=/8w76hoz3_Fk8krugvfUaJNgSfG24wprxH7So3lqPoTE=?amount=15&refcode=MT_EM_PT_WL_200204_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

clean_body: Peter, In less than an hour, President Trump will deliver this year's State of the Union address. With the issue of health care on our minds, I am honored to bring a guest tonight who tirelessly works to secure health care for all. As a person with a pre-existing condition, my guest took his personal struggles with the health care system and channeled them into advocacy. I'm proud that he's a Californian, and proud that he'll be my State of the Union guest tonight. Will you stand with us ahead of tonight 's speech and tell the President that access to affordable health care is a human right? = As Americans, it should not be a privilege, but a right to have access to affordable health care. While we've made strides in recent years, too many people in our country still can't get the health care they need. No matter what the president says tonight, I know that this team stands together to fight for our human rights. Thank you for standing with us, Mike Thompson * Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. Last night was a long one. And today, we still don't know the final outcome out of Iowa. But here's the update we can provide:

**This is a very close race among Elizabeth and a few other top candidates and we need to continue pushing full steam ahead for New Hampshire and the next caucuses and primaries.**

The good news is that we're in a great position to keep up our fight. Our campaign is built for the long haul.

But we can't afford to slow down now. New Hampshire is just one week away, and time is running short to make our final organizing and ad investments in the state.

There's never been a more important time for grassroots supporters to make a contribution and power our movement for the elections ahead.

**[Can Elizabeth count on you to chip in $2 or whatever you can to carry our campaign for big, structural change into New Hampshire and beyond? name: Chris Putnam
subject: Events this week!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, This week, I'm traveling across the district to talk with voters and share my plan to support President Trump in Congress. We are hosting seven public events this week, [along with the biggest rally of our campaign to date this Friday](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/uKNWAHbBkcFWb0dSGj1fPQ/KDKiJ8QWUNz3UEaCi03o5Q)! Each of these events is open to the public and I hope to see you there! **February 4th- Coleman Meet & Greet** 7:00 PM 1009 Oak Forest Dr, Fort Worth, TX 76114 ~~~~ ~~**February 5th- Wise County Town Hall **~~ ~~~~ ~~7:00 PM - 8:00 PM
**Decatur Conference Center **~~ ~~~~ ~~ 2010 US-380, Decatur, TX ~~ ~~~~ _Canceled Due to Threat of Inclement Weather_ **February 6th - NW Fort Worth Coffee with Chris** 8:00 AM - 10:00 AM **Seven Mile Cafe** 6300 North Freeway Fort Worth, TX 76137 [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/uKNWAHbBkcFWb0dSGj1fPQ/KDKiJ8QWUNz3UEaCi03o5Q) **February 7th Parker County Rally**
**w/ Live Music from Rich O 'Toole ** 7:00 PM
**Shep 's Scoreboard** 202 Fort Worth Hwy, Weatherford TX [**RSVP Here**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/uKNWAHbBkcFWb0dSGj1fPQ/KDKiJ8QWUNz3UEaCi03o5Q) **February 8th - Block Walk for Chris Putnam** 10:00 AM Email cody@putnamfortexas.com for details. **February 9th Fort Worth Coffee with Chris** 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM 801 W Magnolia Ave, Fort Worth, TX This week is shaping up to be action-packed and I'm looking forward to sharing our positive message with as many people as possible. But most importantly, **I hope we can get together this week, friend!** \- Chris
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/7pZBv7fTDEGtDRZdslEEKg/KDKiJ8QWUNz3UEaCi03o5Q) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/INfFiy02IFkbdsfVYLSiVw/KDKiJ8QWUNz3UEaCi03o5Q)
