name: Kathy Manning
subject: Update from the Trail!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | I have great news to report -- January was an excellent month for our campaign! **Thanks to our loyal supporters, we ended the month strong by reaching our first fundraising goal of 2020. But that 's not all.** We accomplished so much here on the ground in the district, and as a valued member of the team, I want to share the highlights with you: **In early January, we opened Team Kathy HQ!** | [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3bf/3d199a51/2f068a60/7364e898/1524704261/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.mobilize.us/kathymanning/?address=17057&lat=40.2039&lon=-76.7286")
---
**We participated in our first forum, held at the International Civil Rights Museum.**
[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3bf/3d199a51/2f068a60/7364e898/1524704261/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.mobilize.us/kathymanning/?address=17057&lat=40.2039&lon=-76.7286")
---
**We met with dozens of local organizations, including the Guilford County Senior Democrats.**
[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3bf/3d199a51/2f068a60/7364e898/1524704261/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.mobilize.us/kathymanning/?address=17057&lat=40.2039&lon=-76.7286")
---
**We attended a successful community fundraiser for a new park in Winston-Salem.**
[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3bf/3d199a51/2f068a60/7364e898/1524704261/VEsC/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.mobilize.us/kathymanning/?address=17057&lat=40.2039&lon=-76.7286")
---
**We attended the 60th Anniversary Sit In Breakfast hosted by North Carolina A &T State University.**
[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3bf/3d199a51/2f068a60/7364e898/1524704261/VEsD/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.mobilize.us/kathymanning/?address=17057&lat=40.2039&lon=-76.7286")
---
**Our team has knocked on thousands of doors to make sure every voter knows that the primary is right around the corner.**
[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3bf/3d199a51/2f068a60/7364e898/1524704261/VEsA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.mobilize.us/kathymanning/?address=17057&lat=40.2039&lon=-76.7286")
---
I'm so grateful for this team's hard work.
It's clear North Carolinians are ready for new leadership and they're willing to fight for it.
[_**I 'm ready to be the leader North Carolinians need and fight for their interests in Congress, but I can't do this alone. If you're able, please sign up to help volunteer so we can reach as many voters as possible. We're knocking on doors every day!**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d3bf/3d199a51/2f068a60/7364e898/1524704261/VEsB/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.mobilize.us/kathymanning/?address=17057&lat=40.2039&lon=-76.7286")
Thank you,
Kathy

Thanks to our loyal supporters, we ended the month strong by reaching our first fundraising goal of 2020. But that 's not all. name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: BREAKING: Senator Collins announces on Senate floor that she will vote to acquit President Trump
body:
Fight back. Elect Sara Gideon.

**BREAKING: Susan Collins just announced she will vote to acquit President Trump**
**********[FIGHT BACK](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802921/4bef7a87/6d75ec58/287fbe59/4164880541/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDQtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200204-2-full")**********
Friends -
Senator Collins just left the Senate floor, where she announced she plans to vote with Republicans to acquit President Trump.
This decision comes after she voted TWELVE times against witness testimony and subpoenaing critical evidence.
During this impeachment trial, Senator Collins showed us yet again that when her vote could make a difference, she'll side with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell every time. That's why we need to replace her in the Senate:

body:
| | | Michael reached out to you personally this morning, and we wanted to circle back. It's important that you know where this campaign stands as we push forward - [your support is absolutely crucial right now, team.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaac5/134673f2/37c83ece/6997238d/299090590/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Take a moment to read Michael's message and chip in to help here:

| | [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaac5/134673f2/37c83ece/6997238c/299090590/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

[P.S. Read this memo for top supporters from campaign manager Daniel Barash with our team's reaction to last night and what we need for our final push in New Hampshire!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaac5/134673f2/37c83ece/69972383/299090590/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://www.MichaelBennet.com/NHMemo")

* * *

While chaos emerged in Iowa last night, I was in New Hampshire holding a town hall and talking to voters.

I've made it clear that my flag is planted in New Hampshire, and I need to do well in the primary next week to have the momentum and the money to go into Nevada, South Carolina, Super Tuesday, and beyond.

[New Hampshire's politics are a lot like Colorado's, almost evenly divided among Democrats, Independents, and Republicans. That's why I've committed to spend more time here than any other candidate and have an agenda, The Real Deal, that has broad appeal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaac5/134673f2/37c83ece/6997238d/299090590/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B2_020420_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Our playbook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

It’s been a week since the election in Fort Bend, Texas. Now that the dust
has settled, we wanted to go over the results and map out our next steps:

We’re feeling good about where things stand. While the results weren’t
what we had hoped for, we mobilized 1,100 volunteers, knocked on 41,000
doors, and broke a state record for turnout in a special election runoff.

We made the GOP fight for it. Eliz's opponent had to rely on a $1.5
million campaign contribution from his own wallet to defeat us. Gov.
Abbott himself spent the final week busing in volunteers. We even heard
that Donald Trump was tapping into his list of local volunteers to combat
our people-powered team.^1

We have a playbook that will work all throughout Texas. If we can do all
that with just three weeks of lead-up in a single House District, imagine
what we can do when we mobilize volunteers in every corner of the state?

So, what comes next? We’re already hard at work ID’ing the next candidates
to endorse. And we’re all chomping at the bit to get back out there. But
in the meantime, we really need to focus on building our resources up so
we can go all out between now and November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42244?refcode=ema20200204-78720&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=78720%2E444211%2EUSppNK ]We’re asking you to
make a contribution to Powered By People today. With your help, we’ll be
able to continue to do the hard, necessary work of talking face-to-face
with voters across the country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42244?refcode=ema20200204-78720&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=78720%2E444211%2EUSppNK ]Contribute

A lot of these races will be long shots — there’s no denying that. But
we’re used to being the underdogs. And if we’re successful, not only will
we flip the Texas legislature in a transformational way, but we’ll also
have the grassroots infrastructure necessary to hold onto those majorities
in the future.

Looking forward to making history with all of you again.

- The Powered By People Team

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42244?refcode=ema20200204-78720&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=78720%2E444211%2EUSppNK ]Contribute

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1: [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42261?t=1022&akid=78720%2E444211%2EUSppNK ]Patrick Svitek (Texas Tribune) on Twitter

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=78720%2E444211%2EUSppNK

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Mark Warner
subject: What's happening in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
By now, I'm sure you've seen the chaos following the Iowa caucuses last night. One of my chief concerns in the Senate has been securing the integrity of our elections and preserving our democracy
|
---
| | Derek --

By now, I'm sure you've seen the chaos following the Iowa caucuses last night. One of my chief concerns in the Senate has been securing the integrity of our elections and preserving our democracy. Unfortunately, Republicans in the Senate have blocked all of my election security bills.

**[I promise to continue fighting for election security in the Senate-- but I need your help to keep my seat in November.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d65a/53d9897e/53743efa/1c89b1fd/3752972936/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fair?refcode=20200204_f_1_nd__459__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

While the Department of Homeland Security indicated that failures in the app used in last night's caucuses were not the result of malicious cyber activity, the continuing turmoil in Iowa illustrates a larger problem -- we have yet to take the necessary steps to ensure the integrity of our elections.

It's time to take a hard look at the election systems we have in place and make sure they're up to par, from registration systems to election night reporting. **[We need to elect a Senate that takes the integrity of our elections seriously.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d65a/53d9897e/53743efa/1c89b1fc/3752972936/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fair?refcode=20200204_f_1_nd__459__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

The chaos in Iowa created an environment where misinformation is allowed to run rampant online, which further undermines our democratic process. This is an early warning sign that Congress, local officials, and social media companies have more work to do.

We can prevent this. Everyone deserves to know that our elections are fair and secure. **Will you chip in to help me keep fighting for the integrity of our elections in the Senate?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d65a/53d9897e/53743efa/1c89b1fa/3752972936/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA clean_body: By now, I'm sure you've seen the chaos following the Iowa caucuses last night. One of my chief concerns in the Senate has been securing the integrity of our elections and preserving our democracy | | | Derek -- By now, I'm sure you've seen the chaos following the Iowa caucuses last night. One of my chief concerns in the Senate has been securing the integrity of our elections and preserving our democracy. Unfortunately, Republicans in the Senate have blocked all of my election security bills. "" While the Department of Homeland Security indicated that failures in the app used in last night's caucuses were not the result of malicious cyber activity, the continuing turmoil in Iowa illustrates a larger problem -- we have yet to take the necessary steps to ensure the integrity of our elections. It's time to take a hard look at the election systems we have in place and make sure they're up to par, from registration systems to election night reporting. "" The chaos in Iowa created an environment where misinformation is allowed to run rampant online, which further undermines our democratic process. This is an early warning sign that Congress, local officials, and social media companies have more work to do. We can prevent this. Everyone deserves to know that our elections are fair and secure. Will you chip in to help me keep fighting for the integrity of our elections in the Senate? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Thank you for your support. -- Mark Warner | "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
| | Team, Just four days ago, we hit our critical goal of $350,000 to help launch Cory's Senate race. This was because supporters like you stepped up to fuel this campaign. _Thank you._ **Here 's the reality, though: we can't let up now.** With five Republican challengers already running against Cory (and potentially more to come), we simply have to keep raising money so we'll have the resources to win this November. **There 's no denying that we're off to a great start though. Chip in today as a Founding Donor and help us maintain our momentum.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200204_BHQ_20200204-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Trump Lied Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
**TRUMP LIED TO AMERICANS DURING STATE OF THE UNION ADDRESS**

Fellow Democrat,

Trump's State of the Union address was more like a campaign stump speech. Trump lied to the American people tonight. The truth is Trump is hurting the American people every chance he gets. The Trump Administration and Republicans are hurting working people, slashing money from public schools, and risking health care for seniors and those with pre-existing conditions.

Trump and the GOP have made health care more expensive and less accessible. They broke their promise to protect Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, and even backed and persued (_t_ _hanks Patrick Morrisey_) a lawsuit to take health care from Americans with pre-existing conditions, including nearly 800,000 West Virginians.

West Virginians are suffering because of Donald Trump and fellow Republicans.

We will continue to work hard to defeat Donald Trump and his cronies in West Virginia. With your help, we will elect Democrats up and down the ballot to fight for West Virginia families.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14651423/153830171/-244593981?refcode=homebody&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTE0OGVkOS1jYjQ3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bU6Att58N3PPzuUGgUq3E_1MsA-vIhrgYZOYC8k8zpY=)

_Team WVDP_

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: need you to step up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
Tonight as the president delivers his State of the Union address, Democrats in Congress will be thinking about one thing: how they can remove him from Peter, Tonight as the president delivers his State of the Union address, Democrats in Congress will be thinking about one thing: how they can remove him from office.
Their previous efforts to remove him have divided the country and inhibited his ability to do his job. It’s simply not good for the country.
But that won’t stop the Democrats. name: Dan Kanninen, Team Bloomberg
subject: Who has the momentum after Iowa? Mike.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Numbers don't lie.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=7d1c1f1327534c558c34670c0f333210&_e=1d4U3anOmkMWMpQzllJwqmEXSglV_aRt42R0gjvYqfsCrZabrHyG9lPnMz2rPgHM6wq3Pbc54eRKBoNvS_SsMKzRTP1IhA1Faoyl8YjD7UgR2MB2OEdxowcJ_99ptpcWXjvNAEv9Q1KaQr6gCmyS3O-wmcootc_T3BdzqI0R-iD-9FMAaZNGUN5nziO5543kXE8c55mPsBtQOuGPqNV-bD4Ejm14xWoOGRIn2Y5V6jhsVlYx9Ilx4-NTS3v7FxwOzh-gg6jm8HKLgYOjdSxGBPax0O3licdEW7QaQwcAZDU%3D) Nearly a month ago, Mike Bloomberg called for early primary reform. The chaos and confusion from last night show how right he was. We urgently need to overhaul the system to put our party in the best position to win in November, **and we need to nominate the strongest possible Democrat to defeat Donald Trump. That candidate is Mike.** Mike is the only candidate who has what it takes to take on Donald Trump on all fronts, and win. He will win in critical November battlegrounds, expand the map, and make sure we take no state for granted. No doubt about it, we've got the organization and momentum to win. How do I know? Look at the facts: **73** days on the trail **58** cities visited by Mike, in every Super Tuesday state **2,100** staff members on our team in **40 states and territories** **1 million** conversations with voters **300,000 people** who have taken action with the campaign **More than 125 offices** open by the end of the week **Over 1,000** events planned for this weekend [**Watch this great video that tells this story and forward it to everyone you know!**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=7d1c1f1327534c558c34670c0f333210&_e=1d4U3anOmkMWMpQzllJwqmEXSglV_aRt42R0gjvYqfsCrZabrHyG9lPnMz2rPgHM6wq3Pbc54eRKBoNvS_SsMP5nKM6sZ2dB2U3vGs_fuytd2lzYDCUuinQm-lLT9R4Xn6QsL2HiNn7jIFsgg-e3U9fJJhIndvnS-LFyZIT0saCUZrgXECBh2Azy6PDnuGVMtKoNsPFwK6Vg-nbu5qJX-6UeDalJ0ki9EaEkzlC9GHC0_xpIn1tBSTewn0bLU2CDsGYu5XkhotLcBFdxIUM-2Bt4L9wuYC4i5HocP8k39z0%3D) [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=7d1c1f1327534c558c34670c0f333210&_e=1d4U3anOmkMWMpQzllJwqmEXSglV_aRt42R0gjvYqfsCrZabrHyG9lPnMz2rPgHM6wq3Pbc54eRKBoNvS_SsMNh_COusRpJ_mGvef5_BaVCEyR27ml8GfzzSU_3y8eLIE3P1NI7nbd0qaKzyJFelrGWjuuKjC_cN6hY6ILsN5YtWgnlnNWWtvxcC15I71tgpjnoZNhUW_RUaQQWoyGYzWNLKNHmLtPDNUdFlsWBjzTtPUM3xwyviit4Tmc0rQduDId8OMypWl_S2ygji5IHXGk8nZxIKb9SoFM-m5tmPano%3D) Thanks, Dan Dan Kanninen
States Director
Mike Bloomberg 2020

subject: The Democrats are in disarray and we have a chance to beat them.
body:
Help us defeat Kendra Horn | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/84a22251521f/calling-all-patriots-12165421?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=82072728b7&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6022da02e4&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter,
The Iowa caucuses were an absolute MESS last night for the Democrats. It's a stark reminder of the incredible opportunity we have in front of us.

While the Democrats are in disarray over what specific flavor of socialism they plan on electing, Republicans and conservatives are united behind President Trump's America First agenda and the prosperity it has created.

That means we have a real chance of taking back the House, and it's going to be districts like this one--Oklahoma's 5th district--that will get us over the finish line.

National Journal has said that this is the nation's #1 battleground district--and I believe it. Kendra Horn ran as a so-called moderate but has shown her true colors as a Nancy Pelosi rubber-stamp and impeachment-above-all radical.

Everyday Oklahomans are sick and tired of the Democrats' failure to deliver on the issues they've been asking for and we have a compelling alternative to the far-left values and big government on offer by the Democrats.

But we need to make sure we nominate a principled, tested, and strong-willed fighter to go up against Kendra Horn in November. That's me--I have fought the liberal establishment before and I'm ready to do it again to deliver for conservative Oklahomans.

[**Will you consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 today to help us fight back against Kendra Horn's establishment left-wing machine?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5494f818c8&e=795c6d9796)

The Democrat-controlled Congress has failed the American people with its complete unwillingness to secure the border, cut spending, fix our broken healthcare system, or do much of anything other than try and overturn the 2016 election.

[**We can and will take back the House for conservatives in 2020 but we need your help to make it happen. Please consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 today to help get us over the finish line!**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=99a01ed6e4&e=795c6d9796) Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=dd8213845a&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
